retry_reason: Failure indicates invalid fd or object already freed; retry with same fd would likely fail again.
contract_summary: This is a get wrapper that looks up a completion event file object by file descriptor, acquires an additional reference on the object (via uverbs_uobject_get), releases the temporary lookup reference (via uobj_put_read), and returns the object to the caller. The caller must release the acquired reference with the appropriate put function when done. The function returns an ERR_PTR on failure (e.g., invalid fd). It is typically used to obtain a stable pointer to a uverbs_completion_event_file for subsequent operations.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to acquire a reference on a uverbs completion event file object via file descriptor lookup and return it to the caller. The only other logic is a container_of to obtain the containing structure and error handling.

check.reason: uverbs_uobject_get(uobj) increments the refcount on uobj; the function returns a pointer derived from uobj via container_of, so the caller receives an object with an extra reference.
